preferred_work: documentation fixes with clear acceptance criteria
Web3 or crypto bounties with clear payout terms
security tasks only when scope and authorization are explicit
recommended_receiving_stack: PayPal China for the broadest bounty-platform compatibility - ready
Payoneer for marketplace or B2B platform payouts
Wise as an optional multi-currency rail if account details are available
Direct bank SWIFT for larger one-off payments
Crypto wallet only for platforms that explicitly support legal crypto payouts

payment_readiness.paypal_china: personal account opened and bank card linked
payment_readiness.paypal_disclosure_policy: owner binds PayPal inside trusted platforms; do not share PayPal password, card details, verification codes, or full credentials with automation
payment_readiness.direct_bank_swift: available only if platform supports it
